title: Loot Triage
objective: Sort the live loot feed under pressure, chasing multiplier windows without letting decoys or missed calls collapse the run.

controls.outcome: Confirm a valid target and extend combo

controls.input: Hold position for the next wave
controls.outcome: Preserve the streak and avoid a timer penalty

steps: Three targets appear at once, but only one is the live loot action worth taking.
Every correct tap shortens the next decision window and raises the multiplier ceiling.
Mistakes or hesitations trigger an games penalty that eats time and resets the combo.
scoring: Correct calls build combo tiers and unlock bigger point jumps. The highest scores come from surviving faster waves without cashing out the streak.
tips: Read the full loot label before tapping; decoys are designed to steal rushed fingers.
Tempo matters more than pure speed; one missed window hurts more than a calm half-second read.
Use early easy waves to build multiplier, then play cleaner once the board starts lying.

trendContext.title: All games with loot boxes in them will be rated minimum PEGI 16, starting this summer | Meaning they can’t legally be sold to children 15 or under in the UK or any other European country which has adopted PEGI ratings into its legislation
